query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN state IS NOT NULL AND state != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_state, SUM(CASE WHEN city IS NOT NULL AND city != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_city FROM grants;
